summary: Phase 3 Batch 3D — Smartico Voyager loader + Signal Pipeline Status widget. Backend: 51/51 pytest PASS (46 prior regression + 5 new TestSmarticoVoyagerSettings covering 4-field round-trip, public/admin shape, null-clear, 401 gating). Frontend: all 3 smartico inputs in /back-office present with correct data-testids (back-office-smartico-input/loader-input/brand-input); save persists all 3, reload pre-fills correctly. /back-office/queue mounts signal-pipeline-status panel between GenerateForm and queue list — 6 source tiles (twitch/kick/youtube/forum/sports/internal) all render with REAL/MOCK/TOTAL counts; force-poll button triggers POST /api/admin/signals/poll and updates counts (Twitch went to 92 recent / 278 total · all MOCKED as expected). /voita-palkinto: with both template_id+loader_url set, smartico-embed div renders AND <script src='…ui-test.js' data-mittari-smartico='1' data-smartico-brand-key='ui-test-brand'> is appended to document.body — verified via DOM query. 0 page errors / 0 critical console errors on home, back-office, queue, voita-palkinto (1 expected ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED for the fake test loader CDN — by design per mocked_apis brief). Settings reset to null after test.

verified_features.backend_settings_put_round_trip_4_fields: PASS — PUT /api/admin/settings persists telegram_channel + smartico_template_id + smartico_loader_url + smartico_brand_key + updated_at
verified_features.backend_public_settings_exposes_all_4: PASS — GET /api/settings/public returns all 4 keys, no updated_at, no _id
verified_features.backend_admin_settings_exposes_5: PASS — GET /api/admin/settings returns all 4 + updated_at (auth required)
verified_features.backend_null_clear_all_smartico: PASS — PUT with null values clears all fields; public reflects null
verified_features.backend_46_regression_tests: PASS — all prior tests still green (game_scores, mittari_api, phase3_pipeline, phase3_review)
verified_features.frontend_back_office_3_smartico_inputs: PASS — back-office-smartico-input + loader-input + brand-input all present; save→reload pre-fills all 3
verified_features.frontend_voita_palkinto_smartico_embed: PASS — smartico-embed div renders when template_id set
verified_features.frontend_voita_palkinto_loader_script_in: PASS — script tag with data-mittari-smartico='1' + correct src + data-smartico-brand-key appended to document.body when both template_id+loader_url set
verified_features.frontend_signal_pipeline_status_panel: PASS — signal-pipeline-status panel on /back-office/queue with all 6 source tiles (twitch/kick/youtube/forum/sports/internal)
verified_features.frontend_force_poll_button: PASS — signal-pipeline-poll click triggers /api/admin/signals/poll and tile counts update
verified_features.frontend_console_health: PASS — 0 page errors and 0 critical console errors across /, /back-office, /back-office/queue, /voita-palkinto (1 expected ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED for fake smartico CDN test URL — by design)

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPayload + _get_settings_doc + PUT/GET endpoints extended cleanly — additive (no breaking shape change), 4 fields always returned including null defaults.

VoitaPalkinto.jsx loader-script injection effect has proper guard against double-injection (querySelector check) and proper cleanup on unmount — good. Brand key correctly conditional via `if (brandKey)`.

SignalPipelineStatus widget polls every 30s (clearInterval cleanup present) and exposes a force-poll affordance for ops — solid observability addition. liveByCat reduction correctly distinguishes real vs mocked counts per source.
Public /settings/public still strips updated_at + _id — no admin metadata leak.

Minor: BackOffice.jsx state initialization for 3 smartico fields is correct but the form has grown — consider extracting Smartico section into its own subcomponent if a 4th smartico field arrives later (not blocking).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_smartico.py (new — 5 tests covering Batch 3D Smartico Voyager settings)
seed_data_creation: Brief test data written to settings during round-trip tests; reset to all-null at end of run (cleanup confirmed via curl). One extra signal poll cycle triggered via force-poll button (signals collection appended ~278 total twitch entries — append-only, by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Batch 3D complete and green. Settings now has 4 smartico fields (template_id, loader_url, brand_key + telegram_channel). /back-office shows 3 smartico inputs; /back-office/queue has SignalPipelineStatus widget with 6 source tiles + force-poll. /voita-palkinto auto-injects <script data-mittari-smartico='1'> when template_id+loader_url both set. Settings reset to null at end. Mocked APIs (twitch/yt/forum/sports/telegram/email + smartico SDK) remain per design. No outstanding issues from this iteration. Previously-flagged carryovers from iter_7 (index.html title 'Emergent | Fullstack App', missing data-testid='leaderboard-table' on /peli, 'LAST SPIKE' vs 'LATEST SPIKE' copy) still untouched — confirm with PM if these matter.
